headline: Woman's 'I'm Just An Introvert' Is Code For 'I Will Cancel Plans Because My Social Battery Is 'Low'
summary: 'I can't today, my battery is drained,' Amanda said. She was at 94%. 'It's a phone battery,' her friend said. 'Same concept,' Amanda said.
fullBody: Amanda Introvert cancels plans at 'low battery' — which is 94%. 'I'm preserving energy,' Amanda said. 'You're preserving your couch,' her friend said. Amanda has started a 'social battery' tracking app. It's always low. 'I'm recharging,' Amanda said. She's been 'recharging' for 3 years. Her friends have stopped inviting her. 'I'm at peace with it,' Amanda said. 'And also alone,' she whispered.
